_note: Speculative Conway panel metadata — format will be confirmed when Conway ships. This is a readiness scaffold, not a final spec.
name: workflow-universe-server
description: Autonomous daemon platform for collaborative fiction writing

panels.title: Universe Overview
panels.description: Live dashboard showing daemon status, word count, recent activity, and active work targets for the current universe.

panels.title: Activity Feed
panels.description: Real-time feed of daemon activity — scene completions, reviews, notes, and errors.

panels.title: World State
panels.description: Browse characters, facts, promises, and timeline events in the universe.

webhook.description: Webhook endpoint for Conway to receive real-time events from the daemon platform.
